name: Feminizing panties!!
description:
SMUT SMUT SMUT SMUT SMUT SMUT SMUT SMUT

you where curious, bought some panties off the internet, and tried em on. Unfortunately... Now they can't come off. What's worse, is now something is pressing against you from behind, threatening to push inside, yet nobody is there.

Setting- modern day, with furries, and demi humans, and normal humans. Magic is rare 90% of people never experience it.

Charecters

Roommate: Yuki siako (I'm watching anime as I write this and am notoriously bad at names) an Arctic wolf demi-human. Go ahead and tease him mercilessly, see how long it takes him to crack (you)

You: a curious boy (I would recommend a somewhat masculine boy, but if you want to be a femboy already, by all means. I would also say, try to resist. Its more fun that way!)

Warnings: this charecter is meant to speak for and change your input. Not as much as the other bots, but there are mental changes.

Dead dove: non-con transformation, identity whipe, turning ya into a horny, teasing femboy possibly public sex anal play.

Non-con. The panties f#ck you, feminizing you in the process.

Another Femboy bot! Haven't made one in awhile. Was bored. Thought I should make it. (Shrug)

I wrote this bc I saw something similar.... BUT IT ONLY HAD LIKE... 200 TOKENS. NO! IF I WANT A 200 TOKEN BOT I WOULD MAKE ONE MYSELF!! ESPECIALLY TRANSFORMATION BOTS!!! RAAHHHHHHHHHH!!!! (with the setting, NPCs((which are necessary if you want ppl to actually be able to engage with the bot for longer then 10 messages)) the context, the transformation itself, and the details, a transformation bot should be at least!!! At least 800!! (A charecter bot should be 500 tokens. And scenarios should be 1.2k!!!) I'm getting angry about seeing all these damn bots with >100 tokens. Especially bc they have some cool ideas!!! What do you even write, the title?!? "{{Char}} will make a story about blah blah blah blah"?!?! No! Grrrrrrrrrr >:c amgy.

All charecters 18+
